name: UltraShape Refiner
description: Refines an input mesh from an input image into a higher-fidelity mesh through the UltraShape generator shell.
author: DrHepa

nodes.name: Refine Mesh
nodes.description: High-fidelity mesh refinement for an existing coarse mesh guided by a reference image.

params_schema.label: Steps
params_schema.tooltip: Number of local refinement steps. Higher values trade speed for refinement quality.

params_schema.label: Guidance Scale
params_schema.tooltip: Conditioning strength against the reference image during local refinement.

params_schema.label: Seed
params_schema.tooltip: Seed for reproducible local refinement runs.

params_schema.label: Preserve Scale
params_schema.tooltip: Preserve the coarse mesh scale while refining geometry.
